items.title: VI Live: Malen in de basis bij Roma in topduel
items.summary: Zondag wordt er weer volop gevoetbald in binnen- en buitenland. AZ gaat om 12.15 uur op bezoek bij Telstar, FC Groningen speelt tegen Fortuna Sittard, FC Utrecht ontvangt Sparta Rotterdam en ook in het buitenland staat ons veel moois te wachten. Volg het in de VI Live.

items.title: Van Persie geeft update over Valente, Watanabe en Hwang: 'Het zijn net mensen'
items.summary: Feyenoord won weliswaar met 4-2 van Heracles Almelo , maar helemaal zonder kleerscheuren kwamen de Rotterdammers niet uit het duel. Tsuyoshi Watanabe, Luciano Valente en Anel Ahmedhodzic moesten vroegtijdig naar de kant wegens fysieke problemen en ook In-beom Hwang had verzorging nodig. Robin van Persie gaf een eerste update.

items.title: Van Persie pissig over afgekeurde goal: 'Gewoon een geldig doelpunt, kom op man'
items.summary: Robin van Persie was zondag niet te spreken over de arbitrage na de gewonnen wedstrijd tegen Heracles Almelo. De trainer van Feyenoord kon er niet bij dat de openingstreffer van Ayase Ueda na een klein kwartier werd afgekeurd.

items.title: United into top 4 with win over leaders Arsenal
items.summary: Matheus Cunha struck in the 88th minute to hand Manchester United a sensational victory which dents Arsenal's title hopes.

items.title: Oviedo coach: Yamal goal from 'another galaxy'
items.summary: Real Oviedo coach Guillermo Almada branded Lamine Yamal a player from "another galaxy" after the Barcelona forward's wonder goal in Sunday's LaLiga meeting between the two sides.

items.title: Sources: Fulham bid $38m for USMNT's Pepi
items.summary: Fulham have made a bid of €32 million ($38m) for the services of PSV forward Ricardo Pepi, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Estêvão scores as Chelsea ease to Palace win
items.summary: Estêvão opened the scoring and added an assist as Chelsea secured a 3-1 victory over 10-man Crystal Palace.

items.title: Arsenal 2-3 Manchester United: Premier League – live reaction
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from 4.30pm GMT fixture at Emirates Stadium ⚽ Jonathan Wilson: is Carrick more than the new Solskjær? ⚽ Scores | Tables | Premier League top scorers This, from my MBM colleague Tim de Lisle, is a terrific read on what Michael Carrick’s Manchester United did so well last weekend. United showed more intensity than usual, as you’d expect in a derby, but they also showed more composure. Carrick had called for it beforehand, and as possibly the calmest player ever seen in a United shirt, he speaks with some authority on the subject. When Amad broke away in the 33rd minute, he coolly rounded Donnarumma and rolled the ball into an empty net. When Fernandes broke away eight minutes later, he went one better, landing a defender on his backside after rounding the keeper. Both goals were disallowed, but they stood as statements of intent. It’s never the same again! Every game is different but we’ve had a good week and we’re in good shape. We understand this has been a tough place to come for many teams. But we’re going into the game in a good spirit and that’s the most important thing. Continue reading...

items.title: Why can't Newcastle win without Guimaraes?
items.summary: Newcastle United have yet to win a league game without Bruno Guimaraes since he made his debut for the club in 2022.

items.title: Napoli blameert zich bij Juventus en haakt voorlopig af in titelstrijd
items.summary: Napoli haakt voorlopig af in de Italiaanse titelstrijd. De ploeg van Antonio Conte ging zondagavond met 3-0 onderuit bij Juventus en dat was alweer het vierde puntenverlies dit kalenderjaar in de Serie A.

items.title: Villa 'extraordinary' in first win at Newcastle since infamous 2005 trip
items.summary: Aston Villa produce 'extraordinary' performance as they claim their first win at Newcastle since the infamous 2005 encounter

items.title: Arsenal's mental strength questioned by Vieira
items.summary: Arsenal's former captain Patrick Vieira has questioned the Gunners' "mental strength" in the Premier League title race after they lost at home to Manchester United.

items.title: 'Flamengo komt met gigantisch bod voor Lucas Paquetá', Spierings naar MLS

items.title: 'They're engaged' - Rosenior continues positive start at Chelsea
items.summary: Liam Rosenior has started well at Chelsea and it bodes well for the future amid ambitions to qualify for the Champions League.

items.title: Premier League recap: Man United beat league-leading Arsenal
items.summary: Relive all of Sunday's European football action, when resurgent Man United went to London and beat Arsenal, while Barcelona rebounded to beat Oviedo.

items.title: Hearts rescue draw with 10-man Celtic in thrilling clash
items.summary: Leaders Hearts fought back twice to earn a 2-2 draw with 10-man Celtic in a thrilling Scottish Premiership encounter.

items.title: Leicester sack Cifuentes after six months as boss
items.summary: Marti Cifuentes is sacked as Leicester City manager after just six months in charge with the Foxes in the bottom half of the Championship.

items.title: Man City 'got job done' - so is WSL title race over?
items.summary: Manchester City capitalised on Chelsea's defeat to open up a nine-point lead at the top of the Women's Super League. Is the title race over?
